violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the located in back kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
Knives are being stored between wall and 3 bay sink. PIC informed to remove, clean, sanitize and store utensils on a clean surface. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
Inspector observed leak to the plumbing for the dessert hand sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
Inspector observed a PUR filter attached to handsink faucet head. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
Handwashing signage is lacking at handwashing sink in kitchen. A sign or poster is needed to notify employees to wash their hands. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (prepared cabbage) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. PIC voluntary disposed of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Raw chicken was observed thawing in a bucket. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the all refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Frozen desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of various dry foods. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Utensils in the (kitchen area) are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
Knives are being stored between wall and 3bay sink. PIC informed to remove knives wash, sanitize, and store properly. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
The ceiling in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair(hole near ventilation) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
The ceiling in the bakery prep area (basement) and dessert room area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
